message:
test(fuzz): add structure-aware fuzz target for clique algorithms

Lands the fuzz harness that backs the open franken_networkx-qm7wl
task: a structure-aware libfuzzer target exercising the clique
surface in fnx_algorithms against arbitrary graphs generated from
the shared ArbitraryGraph builder.

fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_clique.rs (106 LOC):
- Reuses `arbitrary_graph` module (CompatibilityMode Strict/Hardened
  picked per input) via `mod arbitrary_graph;` the same way the
  sibling fuzz targets do, so the node/edge topology is generated by
  the project's unified Arbitrary<'a> implementation rather than raw
  bytes.
- Adds a dedicated ArbitrarySmallGraph variant capped at 16 nodes
  specifically for EnumerateAllCliques, where the output is
  worst-case exponential in node count. This matches the "smaller
  DAGs for combinatorial algorithms" pattern already adopted in
  796405c and avoids the fuzzer spending all its budget inside one
  exploding input.
- Edge density is derived from `edge_density % 6`, capping the mean
  degree so the generated graph stays well below the combinatorial
  cliff while still letting the fuzzer find dense subgraphs that
  stress max_clique / enumerate_all_cliques / clique_removal.
- CliqueInput enum routes each iteration to one of:
  enumerate_all_cliques, max_clique, max_weight_clique,
  graph_clique_number, large_clique_size, clique_removal -- covering
  both exact-exponential and bounded-polynomial entry points.
- Enumeration path bails after 1000 cliques to bound per-input
  runtime on pathological small graphs that still blow up.

fuzz/Cargo.toml:
- Register the `fuzz_clique` bin target with
  path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_clique.rs" and doc = false, following
  the same pattern used for fuzz_bipartite / fuzz_dag etc. so
  `cargo fuzz run fuzz_clique` picks it up.

No production algorithm changes -- this is purely a new differential
/ crash-hunting entry point for the clique family. The companion
bead update (status transition for franken_networkx-qm7wl and related
issue tracking) follows in a separate commit.

files.patch:
@@ -104,3 +104,8 @@ doc = false
 name = "fuzz_bipartite"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_bipartite.rs"
 doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_clique"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_clique.rs"
+doc = false
